summary: Implementation plan for surpassing the 0.95410 LB target. Based on forensic analysis of 40+ submissions. Proposes a v8 pipeline that upgrades the clean CatBoost+LightGBM baseline with: (1) XGBoost added to the ensemble, (2) more HPO seeds and improved search space, (3) safe pseudo-labeling with holdout validation gating, (4) stacking via logistic regression meta-learner, (5) multi-seed CatBoost (3 seeds instead of 2). Target: OOF 0.957+, LB 0.954+.
